name: Sweet Bonanza
description: A colorful slot with cascading reels and tumbling multipliers. Land candy symbols to trigger sweet bonuses and free spins.

name: Gates of Olympus
description: A mythological slot featuring multipliers and free spins in a high-volatility setup. Zeus can drop random multipliers at any moment.

description: Live roulette with random multiplier numbers and fast-paced rounds. Designed for players who want a classic table feel with modern visuals.

name: Crazy Time
description: A game-show style live casino title with bonus wheels and random multipliers. Every spin can unlock unique bonus mini-games.

description: Adventure-themed slot with expanding symbols during free spins. A strong pick for players who enjoy high-risk, high-reward sessions.

name: Starburst
description: A classic and easy-to-understand slot with expanding wilds and respins. Popular for smooth gameplay and simple mechanics.

name: Gonzo's Quest
description: Iconic avalanche mechanic with increasing multipliers in free-fall wins. A balanced slot with a strong visual identity.

name: Mega Moolah
description: Progressive jackpot slot known for massive top prizes. Lower RTP, but designed around life-changing jackpot potential.

name: Blackjack Classic
description: Traditional blackjack table with familiar rules and polished UI. Great for low-volatility card gameplay.

name: Reactoonz
description: Cluster-based slot with feature-rich chain reactions and random modifiers. Dynamic rounds and vivid animations.

name: Wolf Gold
description: Wild west themed slot with money respin and free spin bonuses. A balanced profile suitable for broad audiences.

name: Immersive Roulette
description: Live roulette product with cinematic camera angles and polished studio production. Built for premium live-table experience.
